text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've been asked to help with a mini concert the
academy is putting on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Four Umamusume will be performing. The concert
won't be for a while, but the promo posters have
already arrived.
choice_data_list: Time to put these all up!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: One, two! One, two!
choice_data_list: Hey. You're hard at work, as always.
Hey. You're hard at work, as always.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Oh! Hello again!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Thanks again for helping me tutor my classmates.
choice_data_list: Of course. Don't mention it.
Of course. Don't mention it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Remembering back, she was practicing her
dancing before her classmate called us away. And
now that I think of it...
choice_data_list:
I'm guessing you're going to be in the concert,
huh?

I'm guessing you're going to be in the concert,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
That poster... Wow, they've arrived already?
That's fast. But yeah, I am!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't Opera O look fantastic on that poster?
And so do Doto and Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
That reminds me—I heard a trainer's been
assigned to the event as support staff.
choice_data_list: Yep. That would be me.
Yep. That would be me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
What a coincidence! Well, here's to working
together again!
choice_data_list: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's hard to believe she started practicing for the
concert so far in advance. She's the epitome of
dedicated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, while I'm checking the trainer
version of the school's event schedule...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Excuse me. Do you have a moment, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Of course. How can I help you?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, were you checking the school schedule?
Perfect timing, then. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
There have been some changes to the
participants listed for the next scrimmage. Here's
the new list.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take a look and notice Narita Top Road has
been added to it.
choice_data_list: Top Road is participating in it too?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Yes. We were worried that we wouldn't find a sub
in time, but she volunteered to fill the vacant
slot.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
It's got her whole class excited. She's quite the
popular class rep, you know.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's doing this on top of the upcoming concert?
I'm worried she might be overstretching herself,
so I go to check in the training center, and...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Huff! Huff! Phew!
choice_data_list:
I had a bad feeling you'd be here... It's getting
pretty late.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Oh? It's you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for coming to check on me! I guess I
must've worried you...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
But if you're scared I'm overworking myself, I'm
not. I'm keeping a close eye on how much I'm
training just to be sure.
choice_data_list: Still...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... Can I show you my dance for the
concert, please?
choice_data_list: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I can answer, she starts dancing.
Compared to the last time I saw her...
choice_data_list: Incredible! Your dance is perfect!
Incredible! Your dance is perfect!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. Well? Does that ease your worries a
little?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I started practicing my dance ages ago and
polished it up little by little. I've already nailed it
down completely.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
That's why I've been devoting more time to my
running than dancing lately!
choice_data_list: Honestly, you're incredible!
Honestly, you're incredible!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's brushing it off like it's nothing, but it's clear
how much effort she's putting in daily to meet
everyone's expectations.
choice_data_list: I can't wait to see you in the scrimmage!
Still, be careful not to overtax yourself.
Still, be careful not to overtax yourself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's brushing it off like it's nothing, but it's clear
how much effort she's putting in daily to meet
everyone's expectations.
choice_data_list: I can't wait to see you in the scrimmage!
Still, be careful not to overtax yourself.
Still, be careful not to overtax yourself.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! I'll do even more training to make sure I
don't let you down!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She gives me one last bright smile before
returning to the field.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then, on the day of the scrimmage, Narita Top
Road does spectacularly!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, I will. I was just thinking of calling it a day
soon.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I have an idea! Why don't you join me for some
cool-down stretches? You must be feeling stiff
from all your desk work!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then, on the day of the scrimmage, Narita Top
Road does spectacularly!
